statement: In every magma, Equation 776 (`x = y * (z * ((z * x) * z))`) implies Equation 629 (`x = x * (y * ((x * x) * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0652
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op z x) z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op x (op y (op (op x x) x)))
